customData.b1-note: Legacy passive trigger 'onPlayCard' doesn't match combat-system.md §12 (all items resolve on dequeue). Modeled as instant effect + 1-frame activation; B2 to confirm whether passive items belong in the inventory slot model or in a per-run 'always-on' effect layer.
customData.b2-note: OQ-35 resolved: reactive `trigger` prop removed. `bonusDamageFirstHit` is now a dequeue-triggered instant effect — committing the item to a sequence slot applies the bonus for the next hit that lands. Effect implementation added piecemeal to scripts/effects/ when authoring is ready.
